description: Review a PR or branch in parallel with specialist reviewers. A triage step reads the diff, picks the right reviewers for each file type, runs them in parallel, and aggregates findings into a single P1/P2/P3 report (optionally posted as a PR comment).

pr.description: PR number or branch name to review

repo.description: GitHub repo in org/name format (e.g. myorg/my-app)

post_comment.description: Whether to post findings as a GitHub PR comment

reviewer_registry.description: Path to a reviewer registry JSON file (see examples/reviewer-registry.example.json). Triage matches changed files against the registry's conditional patterns.

steps.title: [review-{{pr}}] triage: detect file types and bond reviewer arms
steps.description: Fetch diff for PR {{pr}} in {{repo}}. Read the reviewer registry at {{reviewer_registry}}. Match changed files against conditional patterns. Bond one review-arm per matched specialist plus all 'always' reviewers. If no registry is present, bond a single generic code-reviewer arm. Close when all arms are bonded.

steps.title: [review-{{pr}}] aggregate: synthesize findings
steps.description: Collect reports from all reviewer arms. Deduplicate overlapping findings. Produce final P1/P2/P3 summary. If post_comment=true, post to PR {{pr}} via gh pr comment.
